lab: qin ai de ren jian ai qing jiu xiang yi duo hua xiang yao zhong xian hua shou shang nan mian zhan ni ba da hong xi zi pu kai yi mu tian ye rang wo men zhu xia ting wei feng yin chang ba yong guang yin fa xin ya qin ai de ren jian lang man duo xiang yi duo hua xiang yao kai xian hua zong yao xue hui qing ni sha
lab_without_tone: qin ai de ren jian ai qing jiu xiang yi duo hua xiang yao zhong xian hua shou shang nan mian zhan ni ba da hong xi zi pu kai yi mu tian ye rang wo men zhu xia ting wei feng yin chang ba yong guang yin fa xin ya qin ai de ren jian lang man duo xiang yi duo hua xiang yao kai xian hua zong yao xue hui qing ni sha
raw_text:
亲爱的人间爱情就像一朵花
想要种鲜花手上难免沾泥巴
大红喜字铺开一亩田野让我们住下
听微风吟唱吧用光阴发新芽
亲爱的人间浪漫多像一朵花
想要开鲜花总要学会清泥沙
